question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero didactic questions. It dumps a complete solution in turn 1 and only confirms the user's self-generated questions in turn 2. There are no teachable-moment prompts.

question_quality.rationale: No questions are posed by the Tutor at all, so there are no choices framed for the student. The student drove all the inquiry.

scaffolding.rationale: The first turn spoils everything: the recurrence, full code, complexity table, and walkthrough. No gradient of difficulty, no opportunity for discovery.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the Tutor's confirmations are accurate and well-organized (sliding window framing, expected values table). But it's a one-way explanation rather than genuine back-and-forth pedagogy.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
